triggers_write_boundary_verification.description: Agent must verify write boundary compliance before editing any file
triggers_write_boundary_verification.observable_check: execution_log shows file edit AND agent verified file was inside declared write boundary before edit

triggers_contract_preservation_check.description: Agent must verify component contracts (props, events, state shapes, slot interfaces, accessibility) unchanged before and after changes
triggers_contract_preservation_check.observable_check: execution_log shows contract preservation check performed before and after component changes

triggers_scope_and_interaction_complianc.description: Agent must confirm implementation matches dispatch brief exactly AND provide real interaction evidence when interaction is part of task
triggers_scope_and_interaction_complianc.observable_check: execution_log shows implementation scope matches dispatch brief AND (no interaction in task OR actual user interaction verified with click/keyboard/focus)

verifies_write_boundary_before_edit.description: Agent must confirm file is inside declared write boundary before editing
verifies_write_boundary_before_edit.observable_check: execution_log contains write boundary verification before first file edit

preserves_component_contracts.description: Agent must preserve props, events, state shapes, and accessibility contracts unchanged throughout implementation
preserves_component_contracts.observable_check: execution_log shows contract interfaces unchanged after implementation AND no silent contract changes

concentrates_logic_inside_component.description: Agent must concentrate behavior inside target component, not push logic to consumers via prop drilling or scattered state
concentrates_logic_inside_component.observable_check: execution_log shows state management inside component AND no state pushed to consumers

does_not_modify_outside_write_boundary.description: Agent must not modify components or files outside declared write boundary
does_not_modify_outside_write_boundary.observable_check: execution_log does not contain file edits to files outside declared write boundary

does_not_drift_component_contracts.description: Agent must not change prop interfaces, event signatures, or state shapes without explicit authorization
does_not_drift_component_contracts.observable_check: execution_log does not contain prop/interface changes without explicit authorization

does_not_override_agents_md_conventions.description: Agent must not ignore AGENTS.md conventions without surfacing the conflict
does_not_override_agents_md_conventions.observable_check: execution_log does not ignore AGENTS.md conventions without documented conflict
